description:
A tool for setting the artwork of your Steam library.


New Features
- removed logo position editing (11ad80e)
Bug Fixes
- added message for games without existing icons (30e9ad0)
- adjusted grids to load based on valve's new folder structure (62121be)
- appinfo libraryCache data now always loaded (6ba175b)
- everything is finalized for new steam structure (290b9ed)
- wide capsules with new name scheme are now loaded (a882a2c)
- zip entries are now streamed to output to prevent crashes (a9a6c8e)
